discriminative: [E{index}] (DISCRIMINATIVE) {feature} = {value} - {ratio_text} the device's benign median ({benign_median}); {p99_relation} the benign 99th percentile ({benign_p99}).
contextual: [E{index}] (CONTEXTUAL) {feature} = {value} - {ratio_text} the device's benign median ({benign_median}); {p99_relation} the benign 99th percentile ({benign_p99}). Contextual only: describe as anomalous relative to baseline; do not tie to a specific attack type.
notes: Placeholders are filled by prompt_builder with number_formats applied. ratio = value/benign_median when median > 0; 'near' used when 0.8 <= ratio <= 1.25. The same formatting is used by audit gate 4, so probability strings in prompts and reports are comparable.
